name_cn:
MONOGRAM_Apricot Hand-woven with Gold Buckle
Phone Holder Mini Bag_
For the current super popular mini bag trend, this is absolutely worth buying! Combines looks and practicality, fits iPhone Plus, and you can go anywhere with just a phone!
Now mini bags are in style, ditch the bulky wallet and switch to a small, exquisite chain bag~
Size: 18x11x2cm
Model: 635095
